title: Stuff that you would like to see in Evangelion 3010
display_title: Stuff that you would like to see in Evangelion 3010
wikitext:
[]: Stuff that you would like to see in Evangelion 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Shark Knight » Sun Mar 13, 2016 1:45 am Alright after giving it some tought I decided to make up a list of things that I would like to see or to happen in 3+1. Because it is fun, feel free to share what you would like. Like "what's underneath Asuka's eypatch for example. Anyways I will post a top 5 of what I would like to see: 1. Unit-01 Coming back, going all archangel mode and battle some MPE like at the end of the N64 Eva game. 2. Asuka's backstory. So far the rebuilds have depended on us knowing Asuka already from the previous series but I would like to see what is her story on rebuild. "yes even if it is a sequel I still wanna know" 3. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:16 am Shark Knight wrote: I want to see what Asuka has under her Eyepatch.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Mar 13, 2016 8:47 am A release date would be nice. As for content, let Khara and Anno do as they will.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2016 8:49 am Sicarius VI wrote: A release date would be nice.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by zlink64 » Sun Mar 13, 2016 10:13 am An epilogue. Do that and I'll be happy.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Mar 13, 2016 10:49 am Shark Knight wrote: What is Mari's Backstory or deal?

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Mar 13, 2016 12:15 pm Reichu wrote: You think that should be an actual part of the movie ? I guess nobody would be expecting it.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Mar 13, 2016 1:38 pm The answer to all of life's problems. The reason to why we are here on this Earth and what this all ultimately means. The solution to all sexism, racism, hatred and violence we commit towards one another. The answer on how to get ahead in this life, make adequate finances and find a loving partner.... If Final can't answer any of those then I'll settle for another good movie.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:24 pm zlink64 wrote: An epilogue. Do that and I'll be happy.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:49 pm What is up with the Key of Nebuchadnezzar?

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Mar 13, 2016 2:55 pm More allusions to Nadia/Harlock/Yamato

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:03 pm ^ Yeah, what'd it do in those movies?

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:05 pm What did what do?

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:08 pm ^ The key of course You were responding to me right?

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:13 pm No. I simply want Misato/Wunder to have moments that resemble those of Okita/Yamato and Harlock/Arcadia

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:17 pm Some backstory to Mari. Some exposition on what happened during the timeskip exactly. Unit-01 breaking out of the Wunder and going fucking crazy - I think this is likely, I doubt they'll just never show Unit-01 again.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:20 pm I'm kinda the opposite, as much as I like the call backs I personally feel it taints the original scenes.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:23 pm I fail to see how (unless of course, we're dealing with callbacks to NGE. If they become too numerous, then NTE would begin to feel less like it's own individual story)

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:25 pm ^ Yeah, those are the callbacks I feel they taint.

[]: Re: Stuff that you would like to see in 3+1             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Mar 13, 2016 3:34 pm Well i'm talking about references to things outside of Eva (something Anno does constantly in all of his works)
